faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers before you sign up.

items.question: What is Echo?
items.answer: Echo is feedback infrastructure for developers. Collect feedback from your product — via API, widget, or forms — and let AI tell you what's happening. No friction.

items.question: How does it integrate?
items.answer: Use an embeddable widget (one line of code), create dedicated feedback pages, or connect directly via API. Pick what fits your stack.

items.question: How good is the AI analysis?
items.answer: AI analyzes sentiment, detects recurring bugs, feature requests, and trends. All categorized and prioritized. You just read the summary and make decisions.

items.question: When does it launch?
items.answer: We're working hard on it. The first version will be ready soon.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Yes. You get 1 project and everything you need for free. Premium plans unlock higher volume, AI summaries, chat with user feedback, and much more.

seo.title: Echo — Feedback infrastructure for developers
seo.description: Collect user feedback via API, widget or forms. AI-powered sentiment analysis and insights. The open alternative to Canny.
seo.keywords: feedback, user feedback, feedback widget, feedback API, AI analytics, user insights, product feedback, echo, canny alternative
